release_notes: Dependency alignment and WebUI sidebar polish: fixed version conflicts across Python packages and improved sidebar layout and styling for better visual consistency.

changes.note: Added the v0.2.1 release notes entry.
Bumped the package version to 0.2.1 and aligned dependency versions.
Polished sidebar layout and styling: fixed alignment, overflow, and visual consistency.
Improved sidebar navigation panel behavior and theming integration.
